'''thofamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nthn|nthn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nthn|nthn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thofamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofamithi|thofamithi]] || [[word:thofamiji|thofamiji]] || [[word:thofamishi|thofamishi]] || [[word:thofamiki|thofamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofamuthuthu|thofamuthuthu]] || [[word:thofamujuju|thofamujuju]] || [[word:thofamushushu|thofamushushu]] || [[word:thofamukuku|thofamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamuthu|thofamuthu]] || [[word:thofamuju|thofamuju]] || [[word:thofamushu|thofamushu]] || [[word:thofamuku|thofamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamufthuf|thofamufthuf]] || [[word:thofamufjuf|thofamufjuf]] || [[word:thofamufshuf|thofamufshuf]] || [[word:thofamufkuf|thofamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofamethe|thofamethe]] || [[word:thofameje|thofameje]] || [[word:thofameshe|thofameshe]] || [[word:thofameke|thofameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofamothotho|thofamothotho]] || [[word:thofamojojo|thofamojojo]] || [[word:thofamoshosho|thofamoshosho]] || [[word:thofamokoko|thofamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamotho|thofamotho]] || [[word:thofamojo|thofamojo]] || [[word:thofamosho|thofamosho]] || [[word:thofamoko|thofamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamofthof|thofamofthof]] || [[word:thofamofjof|thofamofjof]] || [[word:thofamofshof|thofamofshof]] || [[word:thofamofkof|thofamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofamïfthïf|thofamïfthïf]] || [[word:thofamïfjïf|thofamïfjïf]] || [[word:thofamïfshïf|thofamïfshïf]] || [[word:thofamïfkïf|thofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofamïfthïfthïf|thofamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thofamïfjïfjïf|thofamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thofamïfshïfshïf|thofamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thofamïfkïfkïf|thofamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamïfthïf|thofamïfthïf]] || [[word:thofamïfjïf|thofamïfjïf]] || [[word:thofamïfshïf|thofamïfshïf]] || [[word:thofamïfkïf|thofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamïfthïf|thofamïfthïf]] || [[word:thofamïfjïf|thofamïfjïf]] || [[word:thofamïfshïf|thofamïfshïf]] || [[word:thofamïfkïf|thofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofamæthæ|thofamæthæ]] || [[word:thofamæjæ|thofamæjæ]] || [[word:thofamæshæ|thofamæshæ]] || [[word:thofamækæ|thofamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofamathatha|thofamathatha]] || [[word:thofamajaja|thofamajaja]] || [[word:thofamashasha|thofamashasha]] || [[word:thofamakaka|thofamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamatha|thofamatha]] || [[word:thofamaja|thofamaja]] || [[word:thofamasha|thofamasha]] || [[word:thofamaka|thofamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamafthaf|thofamafthaf]] || [[word:thofamafjaf|thofamafjaf]] || [[word:thofamafshaf|thofamafshaf]] || [[word:thofamafkaf|thofamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thofamasha|thofamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofamshësha|thofamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofamrosha|thofamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofamusha|thofamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofamyasha|thofamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofamnkshësha|gothofamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofamnkrosha|gothofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofamnkmusha|gothofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofamnkyasha|gothofamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thofafamasha|thofafamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofafamshësha|thofafamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofafamrosha|thofafamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofafamusha|thofafamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofafamyasha|thofafamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofafamnkshësha|gothofafamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofafamnkrosha|gothofafamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofafamnkmusha|gothofafamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofafamnkyasha|gothofafamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thefæmasha|thefæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thefæmshësha|thefæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thefæmrosha|thefæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thefæmusha|thefæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thefæmyasha|thefæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothefæmnkshësha|gothefæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothefæmnkrosha|gothefæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothefæmnkmusha|gothefæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothefæmnkyasha|gothefæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thofamasha|thofamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofamshësha|thofamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofamrosha|thofamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofamusha|thofamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofamyasha|thofamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofamnkshësha|gothofamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofamnkrosha|gothofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofamnkmusha|gothofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofamnkyasha|gothofamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
